info.title: Command-line
info.description: The Azure Artifacts credential provider can be used to acquire credentials for Azure Artifacts.

options.name: --plugin
options.description:
Used by nuget to run the credential helper in plugin
mode

options.name: --uri
options.description:
The package source URI for which credentials will be
filled

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description:
If present and true, providers will not issue
interactive prompts

options.name: --is-retry
options.description:
If false / unset, INVALID CREDENTIALS MAY BE RETURNED.
The caller is required to validate returned
credentials themselves, and if invalid, should call
the credential provider again with -IsRetry set. If
true, the credential provider will obtain new
credentials instead of returning potentially invalid
credentials from the cache.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Display this amount of detail in the output
[Default='Information']
Debug
Verbose
Information
Minimal
Warning
Error

options.name: --redact-password
options.description:
Prevents writing the password to standard output (for
troubleshooting purposes)

options.name: --can-show-dialog
options.description:
If true, user can be prompted with credentials through
UI, if false, device flow must be used
[Default='True']

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
In standalone mode, format the results for human
readability or as JSON. If JSON is selected, then
logging (which may include Device Code instructions)
will be logged to standard error instead of standard
output.
HumanReadable
Json
[Default='Information']
[Default='True']
